offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed contract renewals cause cash flow gaps. We provide notifications instead of manual tracking of renewals and payments.
problem: Missed contract renewals and payment notifications
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual entry and email notifications for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
